title: My Job to Care
lesson: Looking after a pet every day teaches you to be responsible and caring.
prompts: In a cozy living room, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left gently holding a small fluffy brown puppy, with a delighted smile. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby smiling warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

gists: In a cozy living room, the child (far left) gently holds a small brown puppy, delighted, while the mother at right kneels nearby smiling.

In a cozy home kitchen with a food bowl and a water bowl, the child (far left) nods attentively with a hand on their chin as the puppy sits at their feet, while the mother at right points to the bowls, explaining a puppy needs daily care.
In the kitchen, the child kneels alone pouring kibble into the pet food bowl while the small brown puppy waits happily beside the bowl, caring and focused.
In a sunny garden, the child (far left) walks holding a leash, cheerful, as the small brown puppy trots along on the leash at right — walking the puppy.
Back in the cozy living room, the child sits alone gently brushing and cuddling the small brown puppy, tender and happy.

In the living room in golden afternoon light, the child (far left) sits with the healthy happy puppy in their lap, proud and joyful, while the mother at right kneels with a hand on their shoulder, approving — caring is the child's job.
texts: One morning you cuddled a little brown puppy. "He's so soft!" you said. Mum smiled nearby.
"A puppy needs care every day," said Mum, pointing to the food and water bowls. You listened closely.
You knelt down and poured the puppy's food into the bowl. The puppy waited happily beside you.
Out in the garden, you took the puppy for a walk on the leash. Trot, trot, trot!
Back inside, you gently brushed and cuddled your puppy. He felt happy and loved.
The healthy, happy puppy snuggled in your lap. "You take good care of him," said Mum. Caring is your job!
